lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in poor condition. It shows significant wear on the interior and exterior and requires major mechanical repairs to be in running order.

Up for sale is a well-maintained vehicle in good condition. The exterior remains in great shape, showing only a few minor surface scratches and one small door ding from typical use. Inside, the interior is clean and has been well-cared for, with just some slight wear on the driver's seat bolster. Mechanically, the car is solid, having undergone regular servicing and showing no major issues. It offers a smooth ride and represents a reliable option for anyone looking for a quality pre-owned vehicle that has been treated with respect.

Get a head start on your next project with this budget-friendly find! While it’s currently in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention, it offers a great foundation for anyone looking for a restoration project or a handy fixer-upper at an unbeatable price!
The vehicle is in good condition. It is mechanically sound and reliable. The exterior and interior are well-maintained with only minor signs of regular use.
Good condition.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained throughout its ownership. It runs smoothly and is mechanically sound, making it a reliable choice for any driver. The exterior is clean with only minor, expected wear such as a few light surface scratches and small stone chips. Inside, the cabin is well-kept and shows minimal signs of use, with all electronics and features functioning as intended. It has a solid service history and is ready for the road without any immediate repairs needed.

Presenting an exceptional vehicle in superlative condition. This unit has been meticulously preserved, exhibiting no signs of wear and maintaining its original showroom luster. Every mechanical and aesthetic detail has been scrutinized to ensure it meets the highest standards of excellence. A rare find for the discerning enthusiast who demands uncompromising quality and a pristine driving experience.

Hey there! I'm parting with my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, she’s a total stunner! This car is in truly flawless condition—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve babied this ride since day one, keeping it garage-stored and meticulously detailed. You won’t find a single scratch or speck of dust anywhere! If you’re looking for that 'brand new' magic without the dealership headache, you’ve found it. Come say hi and take a look—you're going to fall in love!

This E46 M3 is a superlative example of the S54-powered legend. Featuring a high-revving 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six with individual throttle bodies, the mechanical integrity is flawless. Comprehensive preventative maintenance includes a DrVanos overhaul, rod bearing replacement with VAC coated shells, and a structural subframe reinforcement. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission shifts with surgical precision, delivering power through the M Variable Differential Lock. Finished in Carbon Black over Cinnamon Nappa leather, the paint depth is consistent across all panels with zero oxidation or road rash. A true collector-grade specimen for the discerning purist seeking peak BMW M performance.
Mint condition. Single owner. No accidents. Garage kept. Service records available. Clean title.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation. This vehicle is in showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior finish retains its deep, factory luster with absolutely zero swirl marks, rock chips, or door dings, further protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in a pristine state; the premium leather seats show no signs of wear or creasing, and the interior retains its original freshness. Every feature, from the responsive infotainment system to the precision climate control, operates flawlessly as if it just left the factory floor. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach. It comes with a comprehensive, documented service history with all maintenance performed ahead of schedule by certified technicians. The engine bay is immaculate, and the undercarriage is free of any oxidation or road wear. Included in the sale are both original key fobs, the complete owner's manual set, and a clean vehicle history report. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning buyer to own a collector-grade vehicle that looks and drives exactly as it did the day it was delivered.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in pristine, showroom-quality condition, exhibiting no discernible wear. Its mechanical integrity and aesthetic presentation are beyond reproach, representing a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast. Every detail reflects an uncompromising commitment to preservation.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence. This vehicle has been curated to a concours-level standard, exhibiting an uncompromising state of preservation. With a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains in showroom-fresh condition, this unit represents the definitive choice for the sophisticated enthusiast seeking mechanical and aesthetic perfection. Each component has been rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our highest standards of performance and presentation.

Hey there! You honestly won't believe the condition of this beauty! It’s been pampered since day one and looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor. No scratches, no dents, just pure perfection. I've absolutely loved driving it, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy this pristine ride. Come check it out—you won't be disappointed!

This E46 M3 is a superlative example of the S54-powered lineage, featuring a high-revving 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and a precision-gated six-speed manual gearbox. The mechanical integrity is absolute, with a fully addressed VANOS system and a reinforced rear subframe to mitigate common chassis fatigue. Performance is sharpened by a limited-slip differential and a refreshed suspension geometry utilizing OEM+ bushings for tactile feedback. The exterior maintains a factory-fresh luster, free of rock chips or swirl marks, while the underbody remains dry and corrosion-free. A collector-grade driver's car for those who demand mechanical perfection.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history included. Flawless interior and exterior.

This vehicle is a true time capsule, presented in breathtaking showroom condition. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, having been professionally ceramic coated and strictly garage-kept under a soft cover. You will find no stone chips, door dings, or swirl marks anywhere on the body. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the premium leather upholstery remains supple with absolutely no bolster wear, and the interior still carries that distinct new-car scent. Every switch, dial, and electronic feature operates with precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a meticulous service history with all maintenance performed ahead of schedule by certified specialists. The engine bay is clean enough to eat off of, and the undercarriage shows no signs of inclement weather exposure. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector to acquire an example that looks, feels, and drives exactly as it did the day it left the dealership.

We are proud to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, featuring an impeccable exterior finish and a pristine interior that reflects meticulous ownership. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our uncompromising criteria for performance and reliability. For the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle in truly peerless condition.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in pristine, showroom-quality condition, reflecting a history of meticulous care and climate-controlled storage. With its flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original factory freshness, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector seeking an uncompromising driving experience.

Hey there! I’m honestly so excited to show you this absolute gem. It’s in gorgeous, showroom-ready condition and has been babied since the very first day. Seriously, it looks and drives like it just came off the lot! I’ve kept it tucked away in the garage and stayed on top of every little bit of maintenance. If you’re looking for a ride that’s practically perfect and ready to hit the road without a single worry, you’ve found it! Feel free to message me—I'd love to chat more about it.

This E46 M3 is a superlative example of the S54-powered icon, featuring a high-revving 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and dual VANOS. Meticulously maintained with a documented rod bearing service and structural subframe reinforcement, this chassis exhibits zero torsional fatigue. Power is delivered through a precise Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox to a variable M differential lock, ensuring optimal lateral grip and corner-exit traction. The exterior retains its factory-fresh depth, while the suspension geometry remains tight, utilizing OEM-plus bushings for a direct, communicative steering rack. This is a collector-grade specimen that performs exactly as Munich intended.
Used car. Mint condition. Flawless paint. Pristine interior. Fully serviced. Clean title.

This vehicle is the definition of a 'time capsule' find. The deep obsidian metallic paint retains its original showroom luster with zero swirl marks, chips, or imperfections, having been meticulously stored in a climate-controlled garage under a premium silk cover. Inside, the hand-stitched leather smells as fresh as the day it left the factory, with absolutely no visible wear on the bolsters and all high-gloss wood trim remaining brilliant and crack-free. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach; every service has been performed ahead of schedule at an authorized dealership, backed by a comprehensive folder of maintenance records. The engine bay is immaculate, and the undercarriage shows no signs of road salt or inclement weather use. It sits on brand-new, period-correct tires wrapped around pristine alloy wheels. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector to own an example that looks, feels, and drives exactly like a brand-new vehicle.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in concours-level condition. Every aspect of this automobile, from its pristine paintwork to its immaculate cabin, reflects a history of fastidious care and climate-controlled storage. This offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of unparalleled integrity and performance, suited for the most discerning collector.

Presenting an exceptional vehicle preserved in absolute showroom condition. This specimen has been maintained to an uncompromising standard, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a level of care reserved for the most discerning collectors. A rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle that mirrors its original factory delivery state.

Hey there! I’m honestly a little heartbroken to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolutely stunning shape—I’ve babied it since day one, and it truly looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor. It’s been garage-kept, meticulously cared for, and drives like an absolute dream. If you’re looking for a ride that’s essentially flawless and ready for a new adventure, you’ve found it. Come see it for yourself, you’re going to fall in love!

Presenting an investment-grade E46 M3 in collector-quality condition. This example features the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual transmission. The chassis remains factory-spec with no subframe fatigue, benefiting from a recent comprehensive VANOS overhaul and rod bearing service for preventative longevity. Suspension geometry is perfectly dialed, maintaining original damping characteristics and bushing integrity. The variable M differential lock provides optimal lock-up under load, ensuring the rear-drive dynamics are as sharp as the day it left Regensburg. Finished in pristine paint with a flawless interior, this is a turnkey specimen for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Single owner. No accidents. Clean title. Detailed service history included.

Presenting an absolute showroom-quality masterpiece that defies its age. This vehicle has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled garage, appearing exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, stone chips, or door dings, complemented by pristine alloy wheels. Inside, the cabin is a true time capsule; the premium leather remains supple and fragrant, with every switch, dial, and digital display functioning with factory-fresh precision. Under the hood, the engine bay is spotless, reflecting a rigorous maintenance schedule performed exclusively by certified specialists. With exceptionally low mileage and a comprehensive, documented service history, this car offers a driving experience that is tight, responsive, and indistinguishable from a new vehicle. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a truly flawless example of automotive excellence.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unrivaled caliber. This vehicle remains in impeccable condition, having been preserved to showroom standards with meticulous attention to detail. Every surface, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a history of rigorous maintenance and climate-controlled storage. This is a definitive acquisition for the discerning professional seeking a vehicle that transcends the standard pre-owned market. We invite you to experience this benchmark of engineering excellence.
